# Nexyyra Events

> Luxury experience architects in Pune, Maharashtra — weddings, corporate events, destination celebrations, and concert production across India since 2012.

## Entity

- Legal: Nexyyra Events Private Limited
- Brand: Nexyyra Events
- Canonical: https://www.nexyyra.com
- Phone: +91 9730594753
- Email: hello@nexyyra.com
- Founded: 2012, Pune
- Events: 1,800+ across 35+ cities
- Languages: English, Hindi, Marathi

## Services

Luxury wedding planning, destination weddings, corporate events, product launches, exhibitions, concerts, celebrity events, fashion shows, brand activations.

Investment: ₹10 lakhs to ₹4 crore+. Complimentary consultation. 30% advance secures date.
